description: A debate featuring Joanna Zen and Cindy on the differences between Eastern and Western crypto, discussing technology, user engagement, and market preferences.
topic_summary: Joanna and Cindy explore the distinctions between Eastern and Western crypto markets, focusing on technology and user bases. Joanna argues from a Western perspective, highlighting her experience in the US, while Cindy represents the Eastern viewpoint, emphasizing her background in Asia. The discussion touches on geographical definitions and market dynamics [t=36:22].
